---
title: "R Data Science Tutorials"
format: html
---

---

# Welcome

Welcome to **R Data Science Tutorials**, a learning platform focused on practical applications of **R programming, data science, and machine learning**.

This site contains step-by-step tutorials designed for:

* students
* data analysts
* researchers
* professionals transitioning into data science

---

## What You Will Learn

This tutorial portal covers:

### 📊 Data Wrangling

Learn how to clean, reshape, and transform datasets using the **tidyverse ecosystem**.

### 📈 Data Visualization

Create professional visualizations using **ggplot2**.

### 🤖 Machine Learning

Build predictive models using R packages like:

* caret
* tidymodels
* randomForest
* xgboost

### 🔬 Applied Case Studies

Each tutorial includes a **real-world case study** to demonstrate practical applications.

---

## Latest Blog Tutorials

Explore the latest articles:

➡ **[View All Blogs](tutorials/index.qmd)**

---

## Why This Site Exists

Many learners struggle with understanding **how theoretical data science concepts apply in real problems**.

This website focuses on:

* reproducible examples
* practical workflows
* real datasets
* step-by-step explanations

---

## Author

**Manoj Kumar**

Data scientist, researcher, and educator working at the intersection of:

* data science
* artificial intelligence
* industrial analytics
* sustainability analytics
